meaning: adj.凯尔特族的,凯尔特人[语]的
examples: City Councilman Daniel Dromm and members of the Keltic Dreams Irishdance group performed "Y."M.C.A..
"That night also marked the Keltic New year and was considered the time" between years, "a magical time when the ghost of the dead watched the Earth."
Anther winner was Dingwall firm Keltic Seafare (Scotland) Ltd, which supplies premium quality Scottish shellfish.
